job_title: Private Wealth, Sales Reporting & Data Operations - Associate
strengths: Proven dashboard and reporting delivery (Tableau, Power BI, Looker)
Hands-on ETL/automation with Python and CI/CD
Quantified impact on reporting efficiency and revenue
weaknesses: Limited direct asset management/financial services experience
Shorter total BI role tenure (2+ years)
improvement_bullets: Developed advanced Excel models utilizing VBA macros to automate complex sales reconciliation tasks, significantly reducing manual effort and improving data accuracy in high-pressure financial environments.
Integrated Salesforce CRM data with internal reporting platforms, leveraging familiarity with CRM analytical workflows to support data-driven decision-making for sales leadership.
Streamlined monthly sales data reconciliation processes by building automated ETL pipelines in SQL and Python, ensuring the integrity of reporting across multiple disparate systems.
Collaborated with stakeholders to document business requirements and data governance frameworks, translating complex technical datasets into actionable sales strategy recommendations.
Executed ad hoc analysis to track sales performance trends, creating interactive Tableau visualizations to provide senior leadership with transparent and reliable business insights.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Private Wealth, Sales Reporting & Data Operations - Associate opportunity with Blue Owl Capital. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep passion for using data to drive sales strategy and operations, specifically within a high-growth asset management environment. What interests me about working for Blue Owl is its reputation for redefining alternatives and its focus on delivering strong, risk-adjusted returns, which excites me as someone who values precision and strategic impact. I believe my expertise in building scalable data automation and my ability to bridge the gap between technical infrastructure and business requirements would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on the 'single source of truth' principle. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified that disparate reporting systems were causing significant data mismatches. I architected a new workflow using Power BI, SQL, and Python automation to ingest CRM data, which eliminated manual entry errors and improved operational efficiency by 40%. Ultimately, I know that the Private Wealth, Sales Reporting & Data Operations - Associate role at Blue Owl Capital would allow me to bring my data reconciliation expertise to ensure the integrity of your global sales reporting. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my stakeholder communication skills. When tasked with presenting findings to leadership, I translated complex statistical models into clear, actionable business recommendations that informed marketing spend and resulted in a 300% revenue increase in targeted segments. I am excited by the opportunity to use my advanced proficiency in SQL, Tableau, and Excel to contribute to the Private Wealth team's success at Blue Owl Capital. I know that my background in building automated pipelines and my commitment to data quality align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
